name: alexbouchez
description: Alex Bouchez — Claude Code plugins persos (ghostwriting LinkedIn + X, gestion devis Dougs).

plugins.name: linkedin-ghostwriter
plugins.description: LinkedIn ghostwriter : rédige des posts viraux, génère des lead magnets optimisés, et gère la base de données (~10k posts). Accès privé.

plugins.name: x-ghostwriter
plugins.description: X/Twitter ghostwriter: scrape, classify, and query posts from any account. Accès privé.

plugins.name: dougs
plugins.description: Manage Dougs draft quotes via direct fetch + session cookie. Single /dougs command with internal routing. Brouillon-only.
